ground_truth_sql: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE total_amount = (SELECT max(total_amount) FROM orders)
generated_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_date, o.status, SUM(p.price * oi.quantity) AS total_amount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY o.order_id

question: List products that have never been ordered.

FROM products p 
WHERE p.product_id NOT IN (SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi)

question: Find the customers who have placed an order with a value higher than the average order value.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE total_amount > (SELECT avg(total_amount) FROM orders))
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.total_amount > (SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders)
GROUP BY c.customer_id
